headline: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Stock After A 19% One‑Year Slide Is Value Emerging
summary: If you are wondering whether Zebra Technologies at around US$228.42 is starting to look like value, this article walks through what the current price might be implying. The stock has been under pressure, with the share price down 1.6% over the last week, 7.4% over the last month, 8.0% year to date and 19.5% over the last year. The 3 year and 5 year returns show declines of 19.1% and 53.7% respectively. Recent coverage around Zebra Technologies has focused on how investors are reassessing the...
